title: HEALTH RELATED SOCIAL NEEDS HOUSING SUPPORTS RENTAL ASSISTANCE - 211info
text: ADVANCED HEALTH HEALTH RELATED SOCIAL NEEDS HOUSING SUPPORTS RENTAL ASSISTANCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Health-related social needs (HRSN) are basic needs that affect a person's health. These benefits help members who qualify with basic needs, including rent payment assistance and utility payment assistance, tenant support, and storage fees. Members can only receive HRSN housing services once per lifetime. Eligibility: Advanced Health members who meet all of the following: -Age 65 or older, children age 0-5, pregnant or gave birth in the past 12 months, OR anyone with a qualifying health condition -Have a household income 30% or less of the average yearly income where the applicant lives -Need support staying in housing -Have a lease or written rental agreement -Lack resources to prevent homelessness Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-noon and 1pm-5pm Email (541) 269-7400 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 269-7400 Main phone (800) 264-0014 Toll-free (800) 735-1232 TTY/TDD Main phone (541) 269-7400 Toll-free (800) 264-0014 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call, email, fax, or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: -Medicaid ID number -All pages of a rent/lease agreement -Proof of income for all people age 18 and older in the household AREA SERVED: Coos and Curry Counties Services: Manufactured/Mobile Home Lot Fee Payment Assistance * Medicaid Recipients Rent Payment Assistance * Medicaid Recipients Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - HEALTH RELATED SOCIAL NEEDS NUTRITION SUPPORTS HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - COORDINATED CARE ORGANIZATION HOUSING/SHELTER - FLEXIBLE SERVICES HOUSING/SHELTER - HEALTH RELATED SOCIAL NEEDS HOUSING SUPPORTS HOME MODIFICATION MATERIAL GOODS - HEALTH RELATED SOCIAL NEEDS CLIMATE SUPPORTS TRANSPORTATION - BAY CITIES BROKERAGE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
